lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਗੁ ਭੈਰਉ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ਘਰੁ ੧ ਚਉਪਦੇ ॥
lines.translit: raag bhairau mahalaa 1 ghar 1 chaupade |
lines.english: Raag Bhairao, First Mehl, First House, Chau-Padhay:

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਕਰਤਾ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਨਿਰਭਉ ਨਿਰਵੈਰੁ ਅਕਾਲ ਮੂਰਤਿ ਅਜੂਨੀ ਸੈਭੰ ਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar sat naam karataa purakh nirbhau niravair akaal moorat ajoonee saibhan gur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. Truth Is The Name. Creative Being Personified. No Fear. No Hatred. Image Of The Undying. Beyond Birth. Self-Existent. By Guru's Grace:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਆ ਕਹੀਐ ਕਿਛੁ ਕਹੀ ਨ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: kiaa kaheeai kichh kahee na jaae |
lines.english: What can I say? I cannot say anything.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਕਰਿ ਕਰਿ ਦੇਖਹਿ ਜਾਣਹਿ ਸੋਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: too kar kar dekheh jaaneh soe |1|
lines.english: You create the creatures, and gazing on them, you know them. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਝ ਤੇ ਬਾਹਰਿ ਕਿਛੂ ਨ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: tujh te baahar kichhoo na hoe |
lines.english: Without You, nothing happens.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਕਿਛੁ ਅਹੈ ਸਭ ਤੇਰੀ ਰਜਾਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: jo kichh ahai sabh teree rajaae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Whatever exists, is by Your Will. ||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਕਿਛੁ ਕਰਣਾ ਸੁ ਤੇਰੈ ਪਾਸਿ ॥
lines.translit: jo kichh karanaa su terai paas |
lines.english: Whatever is to be done, rests with You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਿਸੁ ਆਗੈ ਕੀਚੈ ਅਰਦਾਸਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: kis aagai keechai aradaas |2|
lines.english: Unto whom should I offer my prayer? ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਖਣੁ ਸੁਨਣਾ ਤੇਰੀ ਬਾਣੀ ॥
lines.translit: aakhan sunanaa teree baanee |
lines.english: I speak and hear the Bani of Your Word.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਆਪੇ ਜਾਣਹਿ ਸਰਬ ਵਿਡਾਣੀ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: too aape jaaneh sarab viddaanee |3|
lines.english: You Yourself know all Your Wondrous Play. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਰੇ ਕਰਾਏ ਜਾਣੈ ਆਪਿ ॥
lines.translit: kare karaae jaanai aap |
lines.english: You Yourself act, and inspire all to act; only You Yourself know.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਦੇਖੈ ਥਾਪਿ ਉਥਾਪਿ ॥੪॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak dekhai thaap uthaap |4|1|
lines.english: Says Nanak, You, Lord, see, establish and disestablish. ||4||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਸਬਦਿ ਤਰੇ ਮੁਨਿ ਕੇਤੇ ਇੰਦ੍ਰਾਦਿਕ ਬ੍ਰਹਮਾਦਿ ਤਰੇ ॥
lines.translit: gur kai sabad tare mun kete indraadik brahamaad tare |
lines.english: Through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, so many silent sages have been saved; Indra and Brahma have also been saved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਰਾਗੁ ਭੈਰਉ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ਘਰੁ ੨ ॥
lines.translit: raag bhairau mahalaa 1 ghar 2 |
lines.english: Raag Bhairao, First Mehl, Second House:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਨਕ ਸਨੰਦਨ ਤਪਸੀ ਜਨ ਕੇਤੇ ਗੁਰ ਪਰਸਾਦੀ ਪਾਰਿ ਪਰੇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sanak sanandan tapasee jan kete gur parasaadee paar pare |1|
lines.english: Sanak, Sanandan and many humble men of austerity, by Guru's Grace, have been carried across to the other side. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਵਜਲੁ ਬਿਨੁ ਸਬਦੈ ਕਿਉ ਤਰੀਐ ॥
lines.translit: bhavajal bin sabadai kiau tareeai |
lines.english: Without the Word of the Shabad, how can anyone cross over the terrifying world-ocean?

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮ ਬਿਨਾ ਜਗੁ ਰੋਗਿ ਬਿਆਪਿਆ ਦੁਬਿਧਾ ਡੁਬਿ ਡੁਬਿ ਮਰੀਐ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: naam binaa jag rog biaapiaa dubidhaa ddub ddub mareeai |1| rahaau |
lines.english: Without the Naam, the Name of the Lord, the world is entangled in the disease of duality, and is drowned, drowned, and dies. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰੁ ਦੇਵਾ ਗੁਰੁ ਅਲਖ ਅਭੇਵਾ ਤ੍ਰਿਭਵਣ ਸੋਝੀ ਗੁਰ ਕੀ ਸੇਵਾ ॥
lines.translit: gur devaa gur alakh abhevaa tribhavan sojhee gur kee sevaa |
lines.english: The Guru is Divine; the Guru is Inscrutable and Mysterious. Serving the Guru, the three worlds are known and understood.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਰਾਜਾ ਮਨੁ ਮਨ ਤੇ ਮਾਨਿਆ ਮਨਸਾ ਮਨਹਿ ਸਮਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: man raajaa man man te maaniaa manasaa maneh samaaee |
lines.english: The mind is the king; the mind is appeased and satisfied through the mind itself, and desire is stilled in the mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਦਾਤਿ ਕਰੀ ਗੁਰਿ ਦਾਤੈ ਪਾਇਆ ਅਲਖ ਅਭੇਵਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: aape daat karee gur daatai paaeaa alakh abhevaa |2|
lines.english: The Guru, the Giver, has Himself given me the Gift; I have obtained the Inscrutable, Mysterious Lord. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਜੋਗੀ ਮਨੁ ਬਿਨਸਿ ਬਿਓਗੀ ਮਨੁ ਸਮਝੈ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਈ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: man jogee man binas biogee man samajhai gun gaaee |3|
lines.english: The mind is the Yogi, the mind wastes away in separation from the Lord; singing the Glorious Praises of the Lord, the mind is instructed and reformed. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਤੇ ਮਨੁ ਮਾਰਿਆ ਸਬਦੁ ਵੀਚਾਰਿਆ ਤੇ ਵਿਰਲੇ ਸੰਸਾਰਾ ॥
lines.translit: gur te man maariaa sabad veechaariaa te virale sansaaraa |
lines.english: How very rare are those in this world who, through the Guru, subdue their minds, and contemplate the Word of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਭਰਿਪੁਰਿ ਲੀਣਾ ਸਾਚ ਸਬਦਿ ਨਿਸਤਾਰਾ ॥੪॥੧॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak saahib bharipur leenaa saach sabad nisataaraa |4|1|2|
lines.english: O Nanak, our Lord and Master is All-pervading; through the True Word of the Shabad, we are emancipated. ||4||1||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨੈਨੀ ਦ੍ਰਿਸਟਿ ਨਹੀ ਤਨੁ ਹੀਨਾ ਜਰਿ ਜੀਤਿਆ ਸਿਰਿ ਕਾਲੋ ॥
lines.translit: nainee drisatt nahee tan heenaa jar jeetiaa sir kaalo |
lines.english: The eyes lose their sight, and the body withers away; old age overtakes the mortal, and death hangs over his head.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੈਰਉ ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: bhairau mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Bhairao, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਪ੍ਰਾਣੀ ਹਰਿ ਜਪਿ ਜਨਮੁ ਗਇਓ ॥
lines.translit: praanee har jap janam geo |
lines.english: O mortal, meditate on the Lord - your life is passing away!

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੂਪੁ ਰੰਗੁ ਰਹਸੁ ਨਹੀ ਸਾਚਾ ਕਿਉ ਛੋਡੈ ਜਮ ਜਾਲੋ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: roop rang rehas nahee saachaa kiau chhoddai jam jaalo |1|
lines.english: Beauty, loving attachment and the pleasures of life are not permanent. How can anyone escape from the noose of death? ||1||
